text: I feel a sense of humility and curiosity as I move through these scenes. The first space, filled with people, embodies a communal gratitude and attentiveness—an atmosphere of shared purpose and learning. In the second scene, surrounded by displays about research and development, I am imbued with wonder about human progress and the tension between the personal and impersonal in our workspaces. Being here, I feel quietly inspired to contemplate my role within these evolving environments.
